name: Carrot Salad: Ladies Lunch
recipeIngredient: 1 pound baby carrots, julienned and cooked
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the vegetable oil, red wine vinegar, sugar, and dry mustard.
2. Stir in the tomato sauce, carrot julienne, green pepper slices, and onion slices.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Cover and chill for several days before serving. Yield: 6 servings
